```python
def shortest_palindrome(s):
    if not s:
        return ''
    
    # Create the combined string for KMP preprocessing
    combined = s + '#' + s[::-1]
    lps = [0] * len(combined)
    
    for i in range(1, len(combined)):
        j = lps[i - 1]
        while j > 0 and combined[i] != combined[j]:
            j = lps[j - 1]
        if combined[i] == combined[j]:
            j += 1
        lps[i] = j
    
    # Length of the longest palindromic suffix
    longest_palindrome_suffix_length = lps[-1]
    
    # Characters to add at the beginning to make it a palindrome
    return s[:len(s) - longest_palindrome_suffix_length] + s

# Read input from standard input
import sys
s = sys.stdin.readline().strip()
print(shortest_palindrome(s))
```
